ratings.name: maximum voltage
ratings.qualifier: Maximum electrical rating in the series specification.

ratings.name: maximum current
ratings.qualifier: Maximum DC current in the series specification.

land_pattern.locator: page 1, package drawing, circuit diagram, and PCB land dimension
land_pattern.coordinate_convention: Origin at package centre in top view; positive x right and positive y down.

symbol.provenance: Original repository preview of the official contact arrangement.
symbol.reason: The SVG exposes terminal grouping but is not a native EDA symbol.

footprint.provenance: Original repository preview of the visually cross-checked four-land drawing.
footprint.reason: The exact pad data is recorded, but no native footprint is distributed in the seed.

step_model.provenance: No rights-cleared and dimensionally reviewed STEP model has been registered.
step_model.reason: A model must be checked for body envelope, actuator travel, seating plane, origin, and rotation before inclusion.

orientation.description: Terminal callouts and tape geometry are shown; an assembly rotation convention has not been physically validated.

notes: The datasheet allows up to two reflow cycles under its stated profile.
The exact suffix identifies J-bend SMT, 2.5 mm height, tape-and-reel, and RoHS silver-plated terminals.

checks.name: source identity
checks.method: Reviewed the current official three-page datasheet in the browser path; direct byte capture remained blocked.

checks.name: contact topology
checks.method: Compared all four terminal callouts with the circuit diagram and retained the two internally common terminal groups.

checks.name: land coordinates
checks.method: Cross-checked the four land centres and dimensions against the manufacturer package and PCB-land drawing.

checks.name: physical continuity and fit
checks.method: No specimen continuity test, paste trial, assembly, actuator-clearance check, or STEP-model fit test belongs to this repository yet.

known_issues.summary: A two-pad abstraction placed each copper land across one terminal from each internally separate pole, which would hold the connected signal shorted even when the button was not pressed.
An initial visual interpretation paired terminals by package side; the official circuit diagram shows that terminals 1-2 and 3-4 are the internally common groups.
The official PDF is browser-readable but direct automated byte capture returned HTTP 403, so this seed does not claim a source-file hash.

rights.normalized_record_origin: Original Lyon Industries normalization and previews based on the linked official source.
